rulings.Case Title: ROBERT BRYAN et al VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudiciation
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 22, 2016, Line 1. DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudiciation is continued to March 29, 2016 on Court's own motion. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ELITISI SEKONA VS. WELLS FARGO HOME MORTGAGE, INC et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 22, 2016, Line 2. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. SUCCESSOR BY MERGER WITH DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to April 20, 2016. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501 no later than March 30, 2016 by 4:00 p.m. with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PARKVIEW EDGE PROPERTIES, LLC VS. FLEUR FOSTER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment And Recall Writ Of Possession; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declarations In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 22, 2016, Line 3. DEFENDANT FLEUR FOSTER Notice Of Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment And Recall Writ Of Possession; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declarations In Support Thereof is OFF CALENDAR, moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TYRONE YOUNGS VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ET AL (PROVIDED ACCESS)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 22, 2016, Line 4 ( Part 1 of 2). DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with final leave to amend to allege compliance with Government Torts Claims statute. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TYRONE YOUNGS VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ET AL (PROVIDED ACCESS)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 22, 2016, Line 4 ( Part 2 of 2). DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is moot. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HARRIET SCHATZ ET AL VS. 2415 BUCHANAN, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike And Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 22, 2016, Line 5 ( Part 1 of 2). DEFENDANT 2415 BUCHANAN, LLC, CHARLES MOORE, CHARLES MOORE AS TRUSTEE OF THE TRUST AGREEMENT Notice Of Motion To Strike And Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Second Amended Complaint is continued to April 6, 2016 on Court's own motion. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HARRIET SCHATZ ET AL VS. 2415 BUCHANAN, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 22, 2016, Line 5 ( Part 2 of 2). DEFENDANT 2415 BUCHANAN, LLC, CHARLES MOORE, CHARLES MOORE AS TRUSTEE OF THE TRUST AGREEMENT DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to April 6, 2016 on Court's own motion. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KIM KONAMI VS. ARYAN DAVANI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Amend Verified Complaint To Substitute True Names For Doe 4, 5, 6
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 22, 2016, Line 6. PLAINTIFF KIM KONAMI Notice Of Motion To Amend Verified Complaint To Substitute True Names For Doe 4, 5, 6 is GRANTED, no opposition filed. Plaintiff shall file an amendment forthwith. Prevailing party prepare order. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL VS. CHUCK M. POST ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 22, 2016, Line 7. DEFENDANT LEM-RAY PROPERTIES I DE, LLC, CHUCK POST DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Moving party failed to sustain its burned and show preemption (Browne v. County of Tehama (2013) 213 Cal.App.4th 719) either under "contradiction" or "filed of exclusivity" tests. (City of Riverside v. Inland Empire (2013) 56 Cal.4th 729; Citizens for Uniform Laws v. County of Contra Costa (1991) 233 Cal. App. 3d 1468; Rental Housing Association v. City of Oakland (2009) 171 Cal.App.4th 741). =(501/REQ)
